channel.title: opencode OS — AI Agent Skill Store
channel.description: Latest skills added to the opencode OS AI Agent Skill Store — 90+ production-grade developer skills across 6 zones.

image.title: opencode OS — AI Agent Skill Store

item.title: v24.0.0 — Raycast-style redesign with command palette and chat widget
item.description: Complete redesign: dark #05060A theme, glassmorphic nav, JetBrains Mono + Inter typography, ⌘K command palette with fuzzy search, conversational recommendation chat widget, 6 zone tabs (ACTIVATE/BUILD/VALIDATE/PLAYBOOK/MONETIZE/SYSTEM), GSAP staggered animations, and URL API endpoints.

item.title: SEO/GEO optimization — canonical, hreflang, JSON-LD WebSite + FAQ + ItemList
item.description: Added canonical URL, geo meta tags (Manila, PH), hreflang alternates, complete OpenGraph and Twitter Card, JSON-LD for WebSite + SearchAction + ItemList + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, and RSS feed.
